rows.title: Code location instability - gRPC Error code: UNAVAILABLE
rows.reason: No candidate explains that UNAVAILABLE means the connecting process couldn't reach the user code server, that running jobs don't communicate with it, and to use deployment-specific debugging.

rows.title: Using PythonScriptComponent (or any other dagster feature), can I call a python script with different python dependencies than the dagster user-deployment?
rows.reason: Chunk [0] links PythonScriptComponent to Dagster Pipes/external-pipelines but none of the candidates show using a custom venv python executable via PipesSubprocessClient as the reference answer requires.

rows.title: Is there a Celery-specific RunLauncher (without k8s)?
rows.reason: Chunk [10] explains CeleryK8sRunLauncher+celery_k8s_job_executor exist to enforce global concurrency limits across runs, and [7] adds that they must be used together.

rows.title: Partition by row id
rows.reason: No candidate covers using dynamic partitions populated/refreshed by an asset or sensor with ID-range keys.

rows.title: How can I use the cli correctly？
rows.reason: No candidate mentions DAGSTER_HOME or ensuring the CLI and webserver share the same Dagster instance configuration.

rows.title: Multiple code locations in Dagster OSS with shared code (resources, utils)
rows.reason: Chunk 3 covers sharing code via uv path dependencies and chunk 6 covers multi-project workspaces with isolated environments, together approximating the uv workspace recommendation, but no single chunk fully addresses both shared code and per-location env isolation.

rows.title: Structured / json logging by default in Dagster+
rows.reason: Chunk [3] shows the dagster.yaml handler/formatter config but no candidate covers the Dagster+ user-code-container behavior or custom formatter class via '()'/JsonFormatter.

rows.title: Multiprocess slow start for ops
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the multiprocess executor's forkserver start_method or preload_modules config needed for the answer.

rows.title: How can I fetch data about all of my historical sensor ticks?
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the job_ticks table storing tick data or the data retention settings that control its contents.

rows.title: How to use `run_requests` and `dynamic_partitions_requests` with `SensorResult`
rows.reason: No candidate shows constructing a SensorResult with both run_requests and dynamic_partitions_requests/AddDynamicPartitionsRequest together.

rows.title: Confusion about the Dagster hybrid deployment: agents, launchers, executors, workers
rows.reason: Chunks 3/15/19 cover the agent acting as run launcher and the hybrid execution flow, but the default subprocess executor, celery non-support, and k8s/ECS config references are absent.

rows.title: How to define an unpartitioned asset that depends on all upstream partitions
rows.reason: Chunk 10 describes the dict-of-partitions loading and PartitionMapping on AssetIn but none explicitly state automatic AllPartitionMapping inference for an unpartitioned downstream asset.

rows.title: Unit Testing ConfigurableResource Classes
rows.reason: No candidate mentions patching the method on the class before instantiating the ConfigurableResource to avoid Pydantic frozen reassignment errors.

rows.title: Move materialization history when moving assets from one code location to another
rows.reason: No candidate states that materialization history is tied to asset key and unaffected by code location.

rows.title: How to achieve that dbt assets depends on python assets?
rows.reason: Chunk [8] shows defining an asset via get_asset_key_for_source so it runs upstream of dbt assets, matching the reference answer about modeling upstream deps as dbt sources.

rows.title: How to add private Python packages to a Dagster cloud deployment?
rows.reason: Chunks 0 and 1 cover the intro/steps 2-3 but the key YAML build steps are truncated, so no single chunk fully answers it.

rows.title: How do I run a downstream op even if an upstream op fails?
rows.reason: No candidate describes the non-required output + try/except + fan-in workaround or the tracking issue for loosening upstream-failure skip behavior.

rows.title: dagster-dbt is not respecting`--indirect-selection cautious` test selection
rows.reason: Chunk [0] explains Dagster overrides DBT_INDIRECT_SELECTION to empty to explicitly select tests, but no chunk covers the auto-materialize behavior or tracking issues.

rows.title: How to load dbt source description and metadata into Dagster
rows.reason: Chunk [12] is the reference section on defining a dbt source as a Dagster asset for upstream dependencies, but it's truncated and doesn't fully explain attaching metadata from the manifest.

rows.title: How to unit-test `asset_sensor`s
rows.reason: No candidate covers using DagsterInstance.ephemeral with build_sensor_context and materialize_to_memory to unit-test asset sensors.

rows.title: Handle assets that are too big to fit in memory
rows.reason: Candidates cover combining ETL phases into a single asset but none show batching within an asset via a streaming resource generator.

rows.title: What can I access from `context`?
rows.reason: Chunks 0 and 1 point to OpExecutionContext/AssetExecutionContext as the full property list but don't contain the actual API reference details the answer requires.

rows.title: How to delete old events linked to an asset key.
rows.reason: No candidate describes deleting/wiping materialization data for an asset key via the UI to hide it.

rows.title: My Dagster code is hanging or taking longer than I expect to execute. How can I troubleshoot?
rows.reason: Rank 0 covers py-spy dump/record basics but lacks the Kubernetes SYS_PTRACE security context and dagster_cloud.yaml/helm configuration details in the reference.

rows.title: Trying to deploy my code location to Dagster+ and encountering "TypeError: 'type' object is not subscriptable`"
rows.reason: Chunk 10 states supported Python versions start at 3.9 but doesn't explicitly link fsspec/3.8 EOL incompatibility.

rows.title: How can I install drivers like ODBC when deploying my code to Dagster+ Serverless?
rows.reason: No candidate covers the runtime-environment page with pre-install lifecycle hook, disabling PEX deploys, or custom base image.

rows.title: How to give execution priority to assets or ops within a run
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the dagster/priority op tag; chunk 8 is about Celery-specific priority tags, not the general dagster/priority tag.

rows.title: dbt project with partitioned and unpartitioned assets
rows.reason: Chunks 1 and 5 describe creating a separate @dbt_assets definition with a selector to partition only certain (incremental) models, conveying the two-definition select/exclude workaround.

rows.title: Materialize Assets in specific order (besides deps)
rows.reason: No candidate explains that deps is agnostic to data passing or recommends Declarative Automation for ordering.

rows.title: What are some practical/up-to-date  examples for using `dagster-prometheus`?
rows.reason: Chunk 0 shows a basic dagster-prometheus push_to_gateway example but lacks the reference answer's pointers to the resources source and prometheus python client examples.

rows.title: What to do about DagsterUserCodeUnreachableError?
rows.reason: Sensor-timeout guide chunks and code_servers startup timeout appear, but the specific Helm chart values (serverProcessStartupTimeout, deploymentStartupTimeout) from the reference are absent.

rows.title: How to best handle external files
rows.reason: No candidate shows the recommended pattern of a sensor triggering a job with RunRequest run_config passing a shared Config across dependent assets; chunks only cover related sensor/metadata approaches.

rows.title: how to reload Definitions via GraphQL
rows.reason: No candidate states that the GQL client uses old API names but still works with Definitions.

rows.title: How to access the context variable in a graph_multi_asset
rows.reason: Chunks describe accessing context in ops/assets but none address the graph_multi_asset reserved-keyword issue or partition_key access at graph level.

rows.title: How does development with dagster work?
rows.reason: Chunk 18 covers running Dagster locally with dev command, but config/resource environment-pointing info is missing.

rows.title: How wait for queued materializations of partitioned upstream asset?
rows.reason: The reference answer points to a specific GitHub discussion link not present in any candidate chunk.

rows.title: How to set up a rolling window partition dependency between assets?
rows.reason: Chunk [3] introduces TimeWindowPartitionMapping for prior-day dependency but only references an external code example and never shows the start_offset argument needed for the answer.

rows.title: Start a backfill for all partitions from a sensor
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the GraphQL launchPartitionBackfill mutation needed to trigger a backfill from a sensor.

rows.title: New Dagster from Prefect, a database question
rows.reason: Chunk 16 states SQLite is the default storage for Dagster, directly answering the question.

rows.title: monitored_jobs doesn't seem to work on sensors
rows.reason: Chunk 7 is the testing-run-status-sensors guide that the reference answer points to for building context and debugging.

rows.title: Help needed with tags keyword of define_asset_job
rows.reason: Chunk [0] is the exact docs section showing job tags override ECS run_resources defaults, which the reference answer cites.

rows.title: How do I define dependencies between jobs?
rows.reason: No candidate covers run_status_sensor for ordering dependencies between jobs; all discuss asset/op dependencies instead.

rows.title: Get a DynamicPartitionsDefinition updated within a schedule definition before the RunRequest are fired
rows.reason: No candidate covers using SensorResult with dynamic_partitions_requests in a sensor to add dynamic partitions before a schedule evaluates them.

rows.title: How to get all asset keys of assets that are in a particular group?
rows.reason: No candidate covers AssetSelection.groups().resolve() with asset_graph, nor sinks()/roots() programmatic asset key retrieval.

rows.title: Multiple code locations in the same server
rows.reason: Rank 1 from sensor-timeouts.md addresses OSS sensor timeout config but none cite the specific discussion guide #20021.

rows.title: DagsterInvalidDefinitionError: "context" is not a valid name in Dagster. It conflicts with a Dagster or python reserved keyword
rows.reason: No candidate mentions that context must be the first parameter or that argument order causes this error.

rows.title: AttributeError: module 'lib' has no attribute 'X509_V_FLAG_NOTIFY_POLICY' exception while deploying Dagster code
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the PyOpenSSL version pinning fix or the snowflake-connector-python issue.

rows.title: Schedule not working
rows.reason: Chunk 8 covers daemon troubleshooting but none contain the specific gRPC 'Unavailable' connection error or the recreate-daemon-service resolution.

rows.title: How do I "Materialise All" for assets that are in different code locations.
rows.reason: No candidate explains that cross-code-location Materialize All with mismatched partitioning is unsupported.

rows.title: How do I setup dbt Slim CI on Dagster hybrid deployment?
rows.reason: The reference answer is a specific GH issue comment not present in any candidate chunk.

rows.title: Add kind to graph_multi_asset
rows.reason: No candidate mentions AssetOut.from_spec or specifying kinds on a graph_multi_asset output.

rows.title: How can I unit test my run status sensors to verify they trigger the correct jobs in sequence?
rows.reason: Testing run-status-sensor chunks cover building context but not the cursor/evaluate_tick multi-sensor sequence pattern the reference answer requires.

rows.title: Scheduling Time-Partitioned Asset Advice
rows.reason: Chunk 14 describes the 'Customizing schedule timing' parameters including day_of_week, which is the fix for the reference answer.

rows.title: How to incrementally update an asset without using partitions
rows.reason: All candidates focus on partition-based or dbt incremental models, not the vanilla asset pattern without partitions or IO managers described in the reference answer.

rows.title: kick off a job run after another job completes without using Assets
rows.reason: Chunks [1] and [5] cover launching/coordinating jobs via run status sensors, but none show the reference's custom sensor using instance.get_run_records with RunsFilter.

rows.title: Is it possible to make Dagster work like an event-driven workflows?
rows.reason: No chunk covers sensor evaluation-interval semantics or the GraphQL API for externally launching jobs needed by the reference answer.

rows.title: Auto-materialization for dbt views using code version
rows.reason: Chunk 2 mentions AutomationCondition.code_version_changed() for dbt and chunk 3 covers dbt code versions, but none shows setting it via get_automation_condition on the translator for views.

rows.title: `dbt_assets` yields multiple outputs to one `op`
rows.reason: Chunk 9 shows the downstream asset deps pattern and chunk 8 shows define_asset_job, but neither shows the op list-collection trick nor exact my_dbt_assets.keys usage.

rows.title: Job Concurrency - When running, block all others. How?
rows.reason: No candidate states that tag keys are treated equivalently or describes the distinct-tag-key-per-job workaround; chunk [4] offers an unrelated schedule-based alternative.

rows.title: Behavior of declarative automation condition "since()"
rows.reason: Chunk 12 explains since() becomes true when A occurs more recently than B and stays true until B is true again.

rows.title: How to get code into deployment using a Dockerfile in a Dagster-dbt project deployed using helm/kubernetes
rows.reason: No candidate covers the key points: removing build_cache, using --python-file with a Definitions object, or the platform=linux/amd64 build flag.

rows.title: Monitoring code location status
rows.reason: No candidate mentions querying the webserver via GraphQL, which is the core of the reference answer.

rows.title: Schedules are slow to evaluate
rows.reason: The reference answer references specific GitHub PR fixes, thread contention, and the --log-level daemon argument, none of which appear in the candidates.

rows.title: Add dagster tags to Sling stream(s)
rows.reason: Chunks 8/10 mention tags appear in UI and are used for filtering, and 13 explains the empty-string tag-value convention, but none fully states the AssetSpec.tags behavior (tags show only in filters, not asset overview/runs).

rows.title: How to update run config of currently running job
rows.reason: No candidate states that run config can't be modified mid-run nor describes run status sensors checking if a job is already running.

rows.title: Declarative Automation maximum evaluation per tick
rows.reason: These chunks describe sensor asset scoping and per-sensor limits but none state there's no setting to cap materializations per tick.

rows.title: Dagster  used for long-running tasks like consuming Kafka data
rows.reason: No candidate states Dagster lacks a Kafka integration, references the GitHub issue, or proposes Dagster Pipes as the approximate solution.

rows.title: Pass arguments to a sensor
rows.reason: Only chunk [13] demonstrates passing a resource into a sensor function, but no chunk explains the resources-in-sensors concept that the reference answer points to.

rows.title: Question about AutomationCondition.eager() conditions
rows.reason: Chunk 11 mentions eager() uses since() to ensure Dagster only tries to materialize a missing partition once, but it's truncated and doesn't fully explain the infinite-error-loop edge case.

rows.title: Diagnosing Dagster slow starting task in k8s
rows.reason: No candidate references the profiling walkthrough (discussion 14771) needed to diagnose slow startup.

rows.title: How do I mock an asset's value when using materialize?
rows.reason: No candidate describes mocking an asset value via SourceAsset with a custom IOManager in materialize.

rows.title: `BigQueryIOManager` append or replace
rows.reason: The candidates describe a contradictory configurable write_mode (truncate/replace/append) but none state the reference answer's actual behavior of always replacing with partition-aware replace/append.

rows.title: Dagster+ Launcher role permissions for a subset of assets and jobs
rows.reason: These chunks show roles are only assignable at deployment/code-location granularity (not asset/job), implying multiple code locations are needed, but none explicitly states asset/job-level Launcher roles are impossible.

rows.title: dagster._core.errors.DagsterInvariantViolationError: Cannot access partition_key for a non-partitioned run
rows.reason: No candidate shows building a schedule that returns a RunRequest with a partition_key to fix the non-partitioned run error.

rows.title: How to materialize an @asset in a job of @ops
rows.reason: No candidate covers run status sensors yielding RunRequests or launching an asset job via GraphQL from an op, nor the ops/assets jobs distinction.

rows.title: Is using jinja2 for dynamically generating user code an antipattern?
rows.reason: Some chunks touch dynamic graphs and factory functions, but none cover the full factory-method/DSL recommendation in the reference.

rows.title: How to use a custom resource key when using `@dbt_assets`
rows.reason: Candidates show dbt_assets usage with a 'dbt' resource parameter but none explain that the parameter name maps to the resource key in Definitions or how to customize it, nor the dynamic required_resource_keys approach.

rows.title: Documentation notation for AutomationCondition.cron.
rows.reason: No candidate contains the PR link or fix needed for the reference answer.

rows.title: How can I set a max_runtime for the jobs that AutomationCondition runs to timeout?
rows.reason: Chunks describe the dagster/max_runtime tag for run timeouts but none mention applying it via run_tags on AutomationConditionSensorDefinition.

rows.title: How to set the last MontlyPartition to the current month
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the end_offset parameter needed to extend partitions to the current month.

rows.title: How can I query my Dagster+ GraphQL API with my own custom query/mutation instead of using the DagsterGraphQLClient?
rows.reason: Chunk [5] shows the gql Python client approach with the correct Dagster+ endpoint URL, but the code snippet is truncated and lacks the full token header/setup details from the reference answer.

rows.title: Run independent dbt selects for a @dbt_assets declaration with many models
rows.reason: Chunks 1 and 2 show build_dbt_asset_selection/define_asset_job/schedules but none describe the run_status_sensor chaining needed for the full answer.

rows.title: Dagster user management
rows.reason: Candidates confirm user management is a Dagster+ feature but none mention the OSS feature request issue #2219 needed for the reference answer.

rows.title: Help exploring conditional execution in Dagster Graphs
rows.reason: Chunk 12 covers both conditional branching and the fixed fan-in pattern needed for the answer.

rows.title: How to implement multiple production pathways for a single asset
rows.reason: Chunks introduce multi_asset and graph-backed assets as alternative approaches, but none cover the can_subset/is_required subsetting detail central to the reference answer.

rows.title: I want to define a piece of metadata on a graph_asset, and have that metadata be accessible via the context in ops
rows.reason: No candidate shows context.assets_def.metadata_by_key or the graph_asset per-op config-schema pattern needed for the answer.

rows.title: Upstream dependencies for Automaterialization
rows.reason: Chunk [3] shows the .ignore(AssetSelection) pattern for ignoring upstream deps but only for on_missing, not the on_cron/all_deps_match cron-cadence approach in the reference answer.

rows.title: Dagster+ Agent request timeouts
rows.reason: Chunk 15 contains the TCP keepalive socketOptions fix and chunk 0 the error symptoms, but no chunk covers the 1.5.9+ retry upgrade or reproduction script.

rows.title: Max concurrent runs for partitioned asset
rows.reason: Chunk 17 shows tag_concurrency_limits in dagster.yaml and chunk 9 shows max_concurrent_runs; together they form the reference answer's run queue config.

rows.title: How to provide `deps` to `graph_asset`s?
rows.reason: No candidate shows the AssetIn(dagster_type=Nothing) / In(Nothing) pattern needed to provide deps to graph_asset.

rows.title: How to organize single Dagster repo with multiple code locations and DBT projects
rows.reason: Candidates cover multiple code locations and dbt selection but none mention customizing dbt asset group names via a custom translator, the key recommendation.

rows.title: Does @asset cost 1 or 2 cloud credits?
rows.reason: None of the candidates discuss cloud credits, billing, or ops-per-asset cost calculations.

rows.title: How to use dataframes from asset to asset?
rows.reason: The reference's multi_asset+AssetIn pattern is split across chunks (12 shows multi_asset, 13 shows AssetIn, 0/17 show passing dataframes as inputs), with no single chunk combining them.

rows.title: Serverless deployment code location errors: DagsterUserCodeUnreachableError: Could not reach user code server. gRPC Error code: UNAVAILABLE
rows.reason: Chunk 1 covers code load timeout and chunk 4 covers sensor timeouts, but dbt manifest build-time and py-spy/memray profiling info are absent.

rows.title: For production deployments, is it generally okay to have more than one dagster daemon instance?
rows.reason: No candidate states that a deployment should include only a single dagster-daemon process or addresses daemon race conditions.

rows.title: Is there a way to trigger an asset materialization from a sensor without defining a job?
rows.reason: No candidate mentions the sensor decorator's asset_selection argument for triggering asset materializations without a job.

rows.title: How do I connect to a database that requires SSH tunneling, especially for dbt?
rows.reason: No candidate describes using SSHTunnelForwarder/sshtunnel to create a tunnel within an asset or dbt_assets for port forwarding.

rows.title: How to handle and materialize dbt sources
rows.reason: No candidate describes building AssetSpec from dbt source manifest entries and passing them to a @multi_asset with a custom compute function to materialize sources.

rows.reason: Chunk 5 shows instance.get_latest_materialization_event(asset_key) usage to get last materialization timestamp.

rows.title: How to Access Asset Metadata Value Defined in @asset?
rows.reason: No candidate mentions context.assets_def.metadata_by_key for accessing definition-level metadata within an asset.

rows.title: How to schedule an hourly job on a daily partitioned asset
rows.reason: Chunk 5 covers running a schedule on a different cadence using scheduled_execution_time, and chunk 4 covers customizing the ending partition (end_offset), but neither alone fully provides both pieces.

rows.title: Webserver code location error
rows.reason: Chunk 7 covers sensor gRPC timeouts and the DAGSTER_SENSOR_GRPC_TIMEOUT_SECONDS / max workers config addressing the root cause of long-running sensors causing timeouts.

rows.title: How can I export Dagster+ audit logs?
rows.reason: Chunk 18 provides the GraphQL query and API access; chunks 0 and 1 add prerequisites and UI access.

rows.title: Is there a timeout/retry setting I can adjust to minimize `DagsterUserCodeUnreachableError` errors?
rows.reason: Sensor timeout settings appear in [0,3,7] and gRPC UNAVAILABLE network troubleshooting in [2,6], but the specific reference discussions (17729, 20021) are not present, so info is split across chunks.

rows.title: How can we build a scheduled job with dbt assets from two different databases based on dbt tags?
rows.reason: Chunk [0] shows using build_dbt_asset_selection with define_asset_job and ScheduleDefinition, a workable alternative, but no chunk explains the multiple-dbt-AssetsDefinition limitation or DbtManifestAssetSelection.build directly.

rows.title: Adding upstream asset as source has correct lineage but fails on run for DBT
rows.reason: Chunks 0/1/6 confirm the asset-key linking is correct but none explicitly state the dbt BigQuery source location must be properly defined/connectable.

rows.title: How to set a parameter within RunConfig to required
rows.reason: Chunk [8] explains using ellipsis (...) to require a config field, which is the core of the reference answer.

rows.title: Run daily partitions more frequently than once a day
rows.reason: No candidate covers using end_offset=1 to update the current day's partition multiple times throughout the day with idempotent assets.

rows.title: Is there a way to configure a @dbt_asset with asset check?
rows.reason: No chunk shows defining a custom @asset_check in Python targeting a dbt asset key as the reference answer describes.

rows.title: Concurrency contention when orchestrating dbt that materializes to duckdb
rows.reason: No candidate mentions in_process_executor or configuring the executor in Definitions to force sequential invocations.

rows.title: Customize monthly partition
rows.reason: Chunks show monthly partitions and partition_time_window usage for bounds, but no single chunk combines MonthlyPartitionsDefinition, time-window end adjustment, and scheduling.

rows.title: How to Run DAG Steps in Parallel While Passing Data In-Memory?
rows.reason: No candidate discusses using Redis/custom IO manager for in-memory exchange or op hooks for freeing memory.

rows.title: How to create a sensor for alerting on asset check runs?
rows.reason: Chunk [7] describes using a sensor to alert when an asset check job fails, matching the OS Dagster use case; the reference's GitHub discussion link is not in the corpus.

rows.title: Change graph according to configuration
rows.reason: Only chunk [13] (dynamic-graphs/map) partially supports one approach; no chunk covers conditional branching, build-time graph constraint, or defining multiple jobs.

rows.title: Agent-level concurrency limitation for docker-based agents in Cloud Hybrid
rows.reason: Agent queue routing (5,10,3), concurrency limiting/global runs (13,14,19), and ECS alternative (17) are spread across multiple chunks; none alone covers all.

rows.title: Linking to other assets from details view
rows.reason: No candidate mentions MetadataValue.url for linking via hyperlinks; closest chunks discuss metadata/tags generally but not url metadata.

rows.title: How to properly trigger a job once other are done?
rows.reason: Candidates show multi_asset_sensor monitoring asset materializations, not the run-record/RunsFilter job-completion sensor approach in the reference answer.

rows.title: airbyte+ dbt + dagster: dbt upstream dependency issue
rows.reason: Chunk 12 shows scheduling dbt alongside non-dbt assets via define_asset_job/ScheduleDefinition and chunk 10 shows Airbyte job scheduling, together covering the fix, but neither fully matches the Airbyte-sync schedule example.

rows.title: Create dynamic assets on runtime
rows.reason: No candidate recommends using partitions instead of per-object assets or references discussion 12061; they cover dynamic outputs and components only.

rows.title: Confused about code locations and kubernetes
rows.reason: No candidate mentions DefaultRunLauncher or customRunLauncher Helm config needed to run on the GRPC server instead of launching a k8s pod.
